# NetworkBrowser.State.failed(_:)

**Case**

The browser has irrecoverably failed. Do not call `start()` on the browser to restart it. Instead, `cancel()` the browser and create a new browser.

## Declaration

```swift
case failed(NWError)
```
title: NetworkBrowser.State.failed(_:)
